response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and a diverse technical background, but his experience lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of the role, particularly in C++ for capital markets/fixed income systems. His expertise in other languages and domains may offer transferable skills, but the mismatch in mandatory technical and domain experience warrants a cautious recommendation.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with a focus on testability and modern practices (TDD, CI/CD).
Strong communication skills and knowledge-sharing, as evidenced by workshops and talks.
Diverse technical background with exposure to high-performance and real-time systems (e.g., DLang, low-latency apps).
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last noted in 2015) and no explicit mention of Windows platform development.
No direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains.
Primary expertise lies in TypeScript, Node.js, and web/mobile development, not the required C++/SQL Server/Oracle stack.
